# Peritissimus

> The portfolio of Kushal Patankar, a founding engineer and systems architect building scalable AI products and infrastructure.

This site contains information about Kushal's professional work, independent software projects, technical writing, and ways to get in touch.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://peritissimus.com/): Overview, selected work, and latest writing.
- [About](https://peritissimus.com/about): Background, experience, and technical focus.
- [Software](https://peritissimus.com/software): Independent software projects and experiments.
- [Work](https://peritissimus.com/work/zoca): Selected professional case studies.
- [Blog](https://peritissimus.com/blog): Technical articles about AI products and infrastructure.
- [Contact](https://peritissimus.com/contact): Ways to contact Kushal.

## Featured writing

- [Scaling LLM Applications in Production](https://peritissimus.com/blog/scaling-llm-applications): Lessons from building and scaling AI-powered platforms.

## Feeds and indexes

- [RSS feed](https://peritissimus.com/rss.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://peritissimus.com/sitemap-index.xml)
